title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 1110 至 1554 行，共 1554 行) ---
1110 | 
1111 |     def _is_low_information_user_message(self, content: str) -> bool:
1112 |         normalized = re.sub(r"[\s。！？!,.，、~～]+", "", content).lower()
1113 |         low_info = {
1114 |             "你好", "您好", "hello", "hi", "hey", "在吗", "ok", "好的", "好", "嗯", "继续", "接着", "goon", "thanks", "谢谢",
1115 |         }
1116 |         return normalized in low_info or len(normalized) <= 1
1117 | 
1118 |     def _infer_current_status(self, turns: List[ConversationTurn]) -> str:
1119 |         text = "\n".join(self._turn_text(turn) for turn in turns[-6:]).lower()
1120 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in ["traceback", "failed", "失败", "错误", "❌"]):
1121 |             if not any(keyword in text for keyword in ["passed", "测试通过", "修复", "✅"]):
1122 |                 return "failed"
1123 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in ["全部完成", "任务完成", "已完成", "done", "completed"]):
1124 |             return "completed"
1125 |         return "in_progress"
1126 | 
1127 |     def _turn_text(self, turn: ConversationTurn) -> str:
1128 |         return "\n".join(str(msg.get("content", "")) for msg in turn.messages if isinstance(msg, dict))
1129 | 
1130 |     def _collect_steps(self, text: str, completed: List[str], pending: List[str]) -> None:
1131 |         for line in text.splitlines():
1132 |             clean = line.strip(" -\t")[:220]
1133 |             if not clean:
1134 |                 continue
1135 |             lowered = clean.lower()
1136 |             if any(marker in clean for marker in ["✅", "已完成", "完成:", "完成："]) or lowered.startswith(("done", "completed")):
1137 |                 completed.append(clean)
1138 |             if any(marker in clean for marker in ["⏳", "未完成", "待办", "下一步", "todo"]):
1139 |                 pending.append(clean)
1140 | 
1141 |     def _collect_decisions(self, text: str, decisions: List[str]) -> None:
1142 |         keywords = ["决定", "决策", "选择", "采用", "建议", "注意", "必须", "保持", "不要"]
1143 |         for line in text.splitlines():
1144 |             clean = line.strip(" -\t")
1145 |             if 8 <= len(clean) <= 260 and any(keyword in clean for keyword in keywords):
1146 |                 decisions.append(clean[:260])
1147 | 
1148 |     def _collect_preferences(self, text: str, preferences: List[str]) -> None:
1149 |         for line in text.splitlines():
1150 |             clean = line.strip(" -\t")
1151 |             if any(keyword in clean for keyword in ["用户偏好", "prefer", "preference", "希望", "要求"]):
1152 |                 preferences.append(clean[:220])
1153 | 
1154 |     def _collect_files_read(self, turn: ConversationTurn, files_read: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:
1155 |         for assistant in turn.assistant_messages:
1156 |             for tool_call in assistant.get("tool_calls", []) or []:
1157 |                 function = tool_call.get("function", {}) if isinstance(tool_call, dict) else {}
1158 |                 if function.get("name") != "read_file":
1159 |                     continue
1160 |                 args = self._parse_tool_arguments(function.get("arguments", {}))
1161 |                 path = args.get("path") or args.get("file_path") or args.get("filename")
1162 |                 if not isinstance(path, str) or not path.strip():
1163 |                     continue
1164 |                 start_line = args.get("start_line") or args.get("start")
1165 |                 end_line = args.get("end_line") or args.get("end")
1166 |                 line_range = self._format_line_range(start_line, end_line)
1167 |                 files_read.append({
1168 |                     "path": path.replace("\\", "/"),
1169 |                     "line_range": line_range,
1170 |                     "read_count": 1,
1171 |                     "source_turn_id": turn.id,
1172 |                 })
1173 | 
1174 |     def _parse_tool_arguments(self, arguments: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1175 |         if isinstance(arguments, dict):
1176 ...
